---
title: "GlobalHub"
---

## ALIGN Global Hub

The ALIGN Global Hub is a **market intelligence platform** designed to support prioritization and introduction decisions for health products.

It integrates fragmented data across clinical development, regulatory systems, procurement platforms, and policy frameworks into a single, structured view—enabling comparison, forecasting, and decision-making.

---

## Why this exists

Health product data are distributed across multiple systems, limiting the ability to:

- Compare products across pipelines and applications  
- Anticipate what is coming to market  
- Align financing, procurement, and delivery planning  
- Support structured prioritization decisions  

The Global Hub addresses this by integrating and standardizing data into a unified analytical framework.

---

## What this platform supports

The Hub is designed to inform key decision points:

- **Prioritization** — which products to consider  
- **Sequencing** — when to introduce them  
- **Financing alignment** — how timelines match budgets  
- **System readiness** — whether delivery systems are prepared  

---

## Explore the documentation

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### Methods
- [Methodology](content/documentation/methodology.qmd)  
- [Integration Pipeline](content/documentation/integration_pipeline.qmd)  
- [Validation](content/documentation/validation.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Data
- [Data Dictionary](content/documentation/data_dictionary.qmd)  
- [Source Methods](content/documentation/source_methods.qmd)  
- [Horizon Sources](content/documentation/horizon_sources.qmd)  
- [Inclusion Criteria](content/documentation/inclusion_criteria.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Analytics
- [Forecasting](content/documentation/forecasting.qmd)  
- [Likelihood of Success](content/documentation/likelihood_of_success.qmd)  
- [Cost-Effectiveness Analysis](content/documentation/cost_effectiveness.qmd)
:::

:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### Frameworks
- [Product Milestones](content/documentation/product_milestones.qmd)  
- [MNCH Framework](content/documentation/mnch_framework.qmd)  
- [Horizon Scanning](content/documentation/horizon_scanning.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Reference
- [Glossary](content/documentation/glossary.qmd)  
- [Technical Guide](content/documentation/technical_guide.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Get Started
- [About GlobalHub](content/about.qmd)  
- [Full Methodology](content/documentation/methodology.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Scope

Current coverage focuses on high-priority applications:

- HIV/AIDS  
- Tuberculosis  
- Malaria  
- Maternal, newborn, and child health (MNCH)  

Products are categorized by type (therapeutics, vaccines, diagnostics, devices) and indication.

---

## About ALIGN

The **ALIGN Consortium** supports governments in strengthening health product prioritization and introduction through:

- Data-driven decision-making  
- Portfolio-based planning  
- Whole-of-government coordination  

→ [About GlobalHub](content/about.qmd)

![](/www/logo/with_partners.png){height=120px}

© 2026 ALIGN Consortium. All rights reserved.

{{< fa globe >}} [Website](https://alignconsortium.org){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/ALIGN-GlobalHub/GlobalHub){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa envelope >}} [Contact](mailto:align@duke.edu)
